title: nie-bot: workspace member + crate skeleton
description:
What: Create bot/ crate and add to workspace Cargo.toml.

Algorithm:
1. Add "bot" to members array in workspace /Cargo.toml
2. Create bot/Cargo.toml: name=nie-bot, edition=2021; workspace deps: nie-core (path), tokio, serde_json, anyhow, tracing, tracing-subscriber, shlex, age, rpassword, toml, uuid, clap(derive)
3. Create bot/src/main.rs: stub async fn main() -> anyhow::Result<()> with clap Cli struct (relay, keyfile, data-dir, proxy, insecure[hidden], no-passphrase[hidden], self-test flags)
4. cargo build -p nie-bot

Defensive: No logic in skeleton. --insecure and --no-passphrase hidden from --help. NOTE: keyfile is 64 bytes [0..32]=Ed25519,[32..64]=X25519 per identity.rs; CLAUDE.md §1 says 32b but is outdated since nie-rwr7.

Agent team: I (implementer) only. V (validator) runs cargo build + clippy.
Tests: cargo build -p nie-bot succeeds; cargo clippy -p nie-bot -- -D warnings clean
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-bot succeeds; clippy -p nie-bot clean; crate appears in cargo metadata
